title: [OBSOLETE] [Cobblemon] Easier Link Cable
description: Adds an alternate recipe for the Link Cable in Cobblemon
body:
This Cobblemon addon was created to resolve an issue I had with the Link Cable requiring an endgame item in order to be crafted in singleplayer.

This teeny-tiny datapack for Cobblemon adds an alternate recipe for the Link Cable item that simply swaps out the Popped Chorus Fruit for **Ender Pearls**.  I specifically chose Ender Pearls to make them a little easier to craft; they are still somewhat challenging to obtain, but not to the point that it's annoying. 

To install, simply drop into your world's `datapacks` folder and use the `/reload` command if necessary.

Keep in mind this is my first ever datapack. If you find an issue, please send me a DM on Discord.
